opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach has this bright red, weeping rash that itches so much it's driving me crazy. The creams the pharmacist gave me did nothing.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: An itchy, weeping square rash on my belly that the chemist's cream hasn't helped.

symptom_narrative.character: itchy, burning, red, weeping and crusting
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: lower belly, a square patch where my belt buckle sits
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: scratching; the antiseptic cream seemed to make it worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: clear weeping and slight yellowish crust; no fever
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: maybe mild before with metal jewellery

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: started wearing a new belt with a metal buckle

objective_data_offered.value: a sharply-edged rectangular red patch on the lower belly exactly where the belt buckle sits, weeping with a little yellowish crust; scratched
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot palpate for deeper infection
